author: Coffee Nodes
msg:
My licenses are available here: https://unitynodes.club

Note: I do not advocate or support the use of emulators. If detected, they will lead to an IP ban, as they generate synthetic data with no value for telecom customers. The network is built around real devices and real-world data, which is essential for it to remain useful, credible, and sustainable.
